welcome.title: Welcome to Your Career Insights Session
welcome.intro: Hi, I'm your Cairnly career coach. I'll walk you through your personality profile and career recommendations one section at a time. Along the way you can ask questions, push back, or explore any career path in more depth.
welcome.encouragement: When you click below, we go straight into your first personality analysis. No long preamble, we just get started.
welcome.tip: No need to take notes. Every message has a Keep button to bookmark it so you can find it again later, and your full report lands on your dashboard once we're done.

errors.noResponse: I didn't receive a response. Please try again.
errors.timeout: The response took too long. Please try again.

session.completed: Session completed — your report is ready above.
